settings.title: Ghar Jaisa Swad
settings.text: Bilkul waise hi jaise maa banaya karti thi.

settings.title: No Preservatives
settings.text: Koi artificial color ya preservatives nahi.

settings.title: Traditional Recipes
settings.text: Purani aur authentic vidhi se tayyar.

settings.title: Small Batch Made
settings.text: Har batch fresh aur specially aapke liye.

settings.intro_heading: Purani Rasoi — ghar ki yaad, har jar mein
settings.intro_copy: Purani Rasoi sirf achar nahi bechti — hum woh ghar jaisa swaad laate hain jo dadi ke rasoi se aata hai. Har batch small, har masala carefully chosen, aur har jar mein thoda pyaar.
settings.feature_heading: Dadi ke haathon se aaj tak
settings.feature_body:
Kabhi ghar mein achar ripe sun ke banaya jaata tha — dheere-dheere, patiently, bina haste ke. Wahi parampara hum aaj bhi nibhate hain: traditional recipes, natural ingredients, aur koi artificial preservatives nahi.

Purani Rasoi ki shuruaat ek simple sapne se hui — ki har ghar mein woh asli swaad pahunche jo pehle sirf ghar ke kitchen mein milta tha. Aaj har jar usi kahani ka hissa hai.
settings.cta_heading: Ab ghar ka swaad, aapke ghar mein
settings.cta_copy: Apna favourite achar chuniye aur Purani Rasoi ka swaad mehsoos kijiye.
